name: Uddeshhya
description:
UDDESHHYA is a student-run NGO registered under the Societies Registration Act, 1860. Operated by the students of KIET, the organization is dedicated to working for the welfare of underprivileged communities.

Uddeshhya envisions a society where every individual has access to basic necessities and where true happiness is derived from serving others.This philosophy is encapsulated in our tagline: 'Living for a Reason.'
